title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Hexaware Technologies Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Hexaware Technologies Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!
